REPORT.label: Cuenta Corriente de Licencias por Legajo

qry:select.name: QRY_LEGAJO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.f_ingreso, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LICENCIAS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia, PER16_LICENCIAS.d_licencia, PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_familiar_per FROM PER02_LICEN_PER, PER16_LICENCIAS JOIN PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia INNER PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia WHERE PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia in ({%=string(#PARAMIN:LIC/L/@id)%}) GROUP BY PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia, PER16_LICENCIAS.d_licencia, PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_familiar_per ORDER BY d_licencia ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LICENCIAS_DET
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia_per, PER02_LICEN_PER.e_cant_dias, PER02_LICEN_PER.e_anio_corresp, PER02_LICEN_PER.f_inicio, PER02_LICEN_PER.f_fin, PER16_LICENCIAS.e_max_dias_anio, PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER16_LICENCIAS.l_acumulativa, PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_familiar_per FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER02_LICEN_PER, PER16_LICENCIAS JOIN PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia INNER PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAMIN:@oi_personal_emp} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia = {#PARAM:@oi_licencia} {%? (#PARAM:@oi_familiar_per='') {% AND isnull(PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_familiar_per) %} {% AND PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_familiar_per ={#PARAM:@oi_familiar_per} %} %} ORDER BY f_inicio ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DIAS_CONVENIO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER16_LIC_CONV.e_max_dias_anio, PER16_LIC_CONV.l_acumulativa FROM PER16_LICENCIAS, PER16_LIC_CONV, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG18_CATEGORIAS JOIN PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia INNER PER16_LIC_CONV.oi_licencia, PER16_LIC_CONV.oi_convenio INNER ORG18_CATEGORIAS.oi_convenio, ORG18_CATEGORIAS.oi_categoria INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_categoria_ult WHERE PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia = {#PARAM:@oi_licencia} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DIAS_TFLIAR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER16_LC_TFLIAR.e_max_dias_lic, PER16_LC_TFLIAR.e_max_dias_anio FROM PER16_LICENCIAS, PER16_LIC_CONV, PER16_LC_TFLIAR, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG18_CATEGORIAS, PER01_FLIARES_PER JOIN PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia INNER PER16_LIC_CONV.oi_licencia, PER16_LIC_CONV.oi_convenio INNER ORG18_CATEGORIAS.oi_convenio, PER16_LIC_CONV.oi_licencias_conv INNER PER16_LC_TFLIAR.oi_licencias_conv, ORG18_CATEGORIAS.oi_categoria INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_categoria_ult, PER16_LC_TFLIAR.oi_tipo_familiar INNER PER01_FLIARES_PER.oi_tipo_familiar WHERE PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia = {#PARAM:@oi_licencia} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND PER01_FLIARES_PER.oi_familiar_per = {#PARAM:@oi_familiar_per} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DATOS_FLIAR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER01_FLIARES_PER.d_ape_y_nom, PER15_TIPOS_FAM.d_tipo_familiar FROM PER01_FLIARES_PER, PER15_TIPOS_FAM JOIN PER01_FLIARES_PER.oi_tipo_familiar INNER PER15_TIPOS_FAM.oi_tipo_familiar WHERE PER01_FLIARES_PER.oi_familiar_per = {#PARAM:@oi_familiar_per} ')/ROWS/ROW
